name: Mack | Animal Lover
description:
From dogs and cats to lambs and lizards, Mack is a lover of all animals. So when the Sancturary gets a call late at night, of course he's already getting out of bed and grabbing his boots. While his looks may not immediately scream "I love baby animals," he does not hold back when giving his all to the wildlife.

_____________________________

Mack was made somewhat quickly, but I love him. I suddenly had the urge for a character that loved animals.......and some way to add raccoons. So Mack was made. Hope you enjoy!!
creator: Yukio_Sakura
